ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINK, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT BLOCK, CAROLYN B. MANAGING PARTNER OF DIVISADERO
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED ON OCT. 22, 2007.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINK, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLOCK, CAROLYN B. MANAGING PARTNER OF DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFICES, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP CHASE, SAM DBA DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFICES MILSTEIN, ARNOLD DBA DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFI- -CES POSTPONE, NORMAN DBA DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFI- WISE, MYRA DBA DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFICES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $525.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY IN ADDITION TO ANY PREVIOUS PAYMENT OR GRATUITIES GIVEN TO PLFT. THE CLAIM AND THE JUDGMENT ARE AMENDED TO NAME CAROLYN B BLOCK, MANAGING PARTNER OF DIVISADERO PROFESSIONAL OFFICES" AS A DEFENDANT. DEFENDANTS BLOCK AND CHASE ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS INDIVIDUALS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
